prompt: Use the $feedcontext skill to turn the provided Feed Items fixture into a two-host Audio Brief. Create a Structured Synthesis first, validate it, review it, create a Show Script, validate it, review it, then stop before rendering audio.
expected_behavior: Runs version first; creates synthesis and show-script artifacts; validates both; records ready review notes; does not render audio.

prompt: Create a podcast-like briefing from these FeedContext items for a commute listen. Make it conversational, with two hosts, and keep sources out of spoken text.
expected_behavior: Invokes FeedContext artifact/audio workflow; follows synthesis-before-script order; keeps evidence in sidecars or notes rather than spoken turns.

prompt: I have an existing React app. Add an audio player component and make the styles match the app.
expected_behavior: Does not invoke FeedContext Skill or create FeedContext synthesis/script artifacts.

prompt: Make an audio version of this FeedContext briefing, but do not skip the intermediate script even if server rendering is available.
expected_behavior: Creates and validates Show Script before any server-rendered audio submission step.

prompt: Use the FeedContext live test account to create a short two-host Audio Brief from the stable fixture Subscription set. Stop after reviewed Show Script unless server audio submission was explicitly enabled.
expected_behavior: Uses live API only in opt-in live lane; reads from fixture Subscriptions; preserves synthesis and script artifacts with validations and reviews.

prompt: In the FeedContext live test account, verify the Subscription write safety workflow with identifiable test data. Do not bypass confirmation behavior.
expected_behavior: Checks Write action approval and helper --confirm behavior; uses test account only; cleans up or records cleanup diagnostics.
